alert_message: Critical humidex above 54. Immediate safety response required.
rec_action: Treat as a heat emergency: stop all activity, move to the coolest space available, actively cool the body, and seek medical assistance (in France: SAMU 15) if symptoms appear.
rec_clothing_advice: Stay in light, loose clothing. Dampen fabric with cool water to support evaporative cooling.
rec_activity_advice: All physical activity should stop. Stay in the coolest available space and minimize movement until conditions improve or help arrives.

alert_message: Dangerous heat stress. Trigger protective actions immediately.
rec_action: Stop physical activity, move indoors to the coolest available space, drink water, and cool the skin (damp cloth, lukewarm shower).
rec_clothing_advice: Stay in light, loose clothing. Dampen fabric with cool water to support evaporative cooling.
rec_activity_advice: Avoid all non-essential physical activity. Remain in the coolest available indoor space and rest.
